title: Hiring Medical Officer at Lilavati Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Lilavati Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Lilavati Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lilavati Hospital:
Lilavati Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital!
